behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names both file paths, both class names (NemotronHBlock, NemotronHMamba2Mixer), method names (forward, cuda_kernels_forward), and the literal sentinel 'is_fast_path_available = False', and the contextlib removal requirement.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes structural requirements (sentinel value, guard pattern, remove contextlib) but doesn't dictate exact code changes; the developer still needs to reason about how to restructure the forward methods.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for presence of patterns (stream attr, compile guard call, no nullcontext, no contextlib import) rather than specific variable names or line positions; alternative correct fixes following the stated structural rules would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests use ast.parse and walk AST structure rather than substring matching; they inspect code structure which is appropriate given torch/CUDA deps prevent importing.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require specific structural properties (stream attr present AND compile guard present in Mixer, sentinel assigned False, contextlib absent) that a stub cannot trivially satisfy without implementing the fix.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All 5 instruction requirements (sentinel, no contextlib, Block.forward clean, Mixer guarded stream, modular Mixer override) map to corresponding test functions.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass) and include docstrings explaining the bug each test covers.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is a code fix, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: File paths and class names in instruction match those in tests and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the files (appropriate since both must be edited consistently) but doesn't point to specific line numbers; localization within files remains for the agent.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, no config edits involved.
